strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq, including MCP code generators
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GISCollective platform used by real-world NGOs
concerns: Resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) mismatched with all online profiles (Szabo Bogdan), raising red flag for authenticity
No explicit mention of Master’s/PhD in AI or formal AI research, despite preferred qualifications
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy leadership or customer advisory experience at director level
response.justification: The candidate shows deep technical breadth in AI tooling, cloud infrastructure, and open-source leadership, aligning strongly with the role’s technical demands — but the severe mismatch between the named candidate and all digital identities undermines trust and raises serious concerns about resume integrity, which outweighs technical strengths.
